definition: subset of a site’s physical, geographic, or logical group of assets

definition_ml.en: subset of a site’s physical, geographic, or logical group of assets
definition_ml.de: Untermenge einer Gruppe von physikalischen, geographischen oder logischen Einrichtungen eines Werks

note: An area may contain manufacturing lines, process cells, and production units. Areas may be connected to each other by a site local area network and may contain systems related to the operations performed in that area.

note_ml.en: An area may contain manufacturing lines, process cells, and production units. Areas may be connected to each other by a site local area network and may contain systems related to the operations performed in that area.
